message:
fix(codegen): Use runtime.Lib fallback and unique block labels

Two systematic fixes:

1. Module stub fix (generator.zig): When a module is in the registry but
   has no direct_import path, check stdlib_modules_gen and emit
   `runtime.Lib.{module}` instead of `struct {}`. This fixes undeclared
   identifier errors for collections, collections_abc, etc.

2. Label redefinition fix (collections.zig): Replace hardcoded block
   labels (list_blk, set_blk, list_str_blk) with counter-based unique
   labels using self.block_label_counter. This prevents Zig compilation
   errors when the same label appears multiple times in generated code.
